hero.title: 新世代的
hero.description: 一個開源、輕量但強大的線上 C++ 編輯器，專為競賽程式設計而生

features.heading: 功能齊全。
features.description: 瀏覽器，就是你的開發環境。

list.title: WebAssembly 技術
list.description: Compiles C++ code into WebAssembly and executes them directly in the browser — fast, no resource limitations.

list.title: 錯誤高亮提示
list.description: Compiler errors are parsed and pinned to the exact line they occur — clear, actionable diagnostics without the noise.

list.title: 內建測資系統
list.description: Define, run, and compare multiple test cases side-by-side. Designed for the way competitive programmers actually work.

list.title: 自動程式碼格式化
list.description: Clang-format integrated. One shortcut to keep your style consistent — with support for multiple code style presets.

list.title: 多語言支援
list.description: First-class support for English and Traditional Chinese, with more languages on the way. You can help translate on Crowdin!

list.title: 程式碼補全
list.description: Context-aware suggestions for STL containers, algorithms, and your own symbols — write C++ faster without leaving the flow.

list.title: 任何螢幕, 任何裝置
list.description: The interface adapts seamlessly to any screen size. Works on any screen, any device. Code comfortably wherever you are.

list.title: 安全，從設計開始
list.description: Cloudflare Turnstile blocks bots. Every compilation runs in an isolated, single-use Docker container — secure by default.

list.title: 一鍵分享
list.description: Share your code, test cases, input, and results with a single link — instantly, no setup required.

features.openSourceDescription: Audit it, fork it, ship it. MIT licensed.

extension.label: 瀏覽器擴充
extension.title: 不再複製貼上
extension.description: Import test cases directly from your browser with our extension. Support over 100 competitive programming platforms.

stats.compilationsDescription: C++ programs compiled and executed directly in the browser.
stats.lineCompiledDescription: Lines of C++ code processed through the WebAssembly pipeline.
stats.wasmCompiledDescription: Total size of source code submitted and compiled by users.
stats.totalTimeCompiledDescription: Cumulative CPU time spent compiling across all users.

cta.label: 讓我們開始吧
cta.heading: 不再切換工具。
cta.description2: Just open a tab and get your AC.
